description: CompositionPurple textured round neck top made of 100% cotton, has a yoke with lace detailing with tie ups at the neckline, a half buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves with an elasticated cuff and an elasticated hemlineFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's fuss-free minimalistic trend is nailed in this top with its plush fabric. The textured fabric adds an interesting dimension to this basic top. Style this piece from s.oliver with form fitting denims, closed-toe casual shoes from enroute and a  vibrant scarf.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
